---
title: "Projects"
description-meta: "Ongoing research projects on chronic hazards, migration, and insurance."
draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
format:
  html: 
    grid:
        body-width: 600px
        margin-width: 450px

date-format: "YYYY"
listing: 
  - id: people-suds
    sort: "name"
    feed: false
    contents: 
        - people/affiliate.yml
        - people/grad-student.yml
        - people/staff.yml
        - people/undergrad-student.yml
        - people/postdoc.yml
    template: ul-people.ejs.md
    include:
        projects: Sunny Day

  - id: pubs-suds
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 5
    fields: [title, date, subtitle]
    field-display-names: 
      title: Title
      date: Year
      subtitle: Journal
    include:
        projects: Sunny Day
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed: false
    contents: publications.yml
    template: ul-pubs.ejs.md

  - id: people-migr
    sort: "name"
    feed: false
    contents: 
        - people/affiliate.yml
        - people/grad-student.yml
        - people/staff.yml
        - people/undergrad-student.yml
        - people/postdoc.yml
    template: ul-people.ejs.md
    include:
        projects: Migration

  - id: pubs-migr
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 5
    fields: [title, date, subtitle]
    field-display-names: 
      title: Title
      date: Year
      subtitle: Journal
    include:
        projects: Migration
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed: false
    contents: publications.yml
    template: ul-pubs.ejs.md

  - id: people-insu
    sort: "name"
    feed: false
    contents: 
        - people/affiliate.yml
        - people/grad-student.yml
        - people/staff.yml
        - people/undergrad-student.yml
        - people/postdoc.yml
    template: ul-people.ejs.md
    include:
        projects: Insurance

  - id: pubs-insu
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 5
    fields: [title, date, subtitle]
    field-display-names: 
      title: Title
      date: Year
      subtitle: Journal
    include:
        projects: Insurance
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed: false
    contents: publications.yml
    template: ul-pubs.ejs.md

filters: [remove-stray-divfence.lua]
---

## Sunny Day Flooding Project {#sunny-day}

:::{.column-margin}
![Sunny day flooding in Carolina Beach, NC](files/images/suds.webp)
:::

As local sea-level rise, land subsidence, and development continue to increase in coastal areas, so does the frequency of flooding.

The tidal cycle now takes place on higher average sea levels, resulting in “sunny day” flooding of roadways during high tides. Sea water also infiltrates stormwater drainage systems at normal tidal levels, such that ordinary rainstorms lead to flooding. While these minor floods draw less attention than catastrophic storms, their high frequency imposes a chronic stress on coastal communities and economies by disrupting critical infrastructure services.

[Learn more →](https://sunnydayflooding.com/)


::: {.columns}

::: {.column width='40%'}
### Team members
:::{#people-suds}
:::
:::

::: {.column width='60%'}
### Recent Research
:::{#pubs-suds}
:::
:::

:::


## Coastal Migration {#migration}

<!-- ![Sunny day flooding in Carolina Beach, NC](files/images/suds.webp) -->

Who's moving towards and away from coastal hazards?

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width='40%'}
### Team members
:::{#people-migr}
:::
:::

::: {.column width='60%'}
### Recent Research
:::{#pubs-migr}
:::
:::

:::



# Flood Insurance {#insurance}

<!-- ![Sunny day flooding in Carolina Beach, NC](files/images/suds.webp) -->

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width='40%'}
### Team members
:::{#people-insu}
:::
:::

::: {.column width='60%'}
### Recent Research
:::{#pubs-insu}
:::
:::

:::
